title: vicia venosa
intro: Vicia venosa, also known as the veined vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicia venosa include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to creams and ointments for topical applications.
